title: Labour MP Jess Asato sues Elon Musk's xAI over deepfake bikini images in landmark UK AI lawsuit
summary_full: British Labour MP Jess Asato is suing Elon Musk's xAI, alleging its Grok chatbot generated fake sexualised images of her. The High Court case could set a precedent for AI developer accountability, focusing on system design rather than solely user actions. This legal challenge arrives as governments worldwide grapple with deepfake abuse and the need for stronger AI safeguards.
